name: GitIgnore Pro
description: Premium .gitignore generator with smart detection, presets, live preview, and multi-config output

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none';
